category_sources: source_facts.description says it tracks package dependencies across git history; official README calls it a git subcommand for tracking package dependencies.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is git-pkgs; official GitHub repository README heading is git-pkgs.
docs_sources: Official repository README includes installation, quick start, commands, plugins, and configuration sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/git-pkgs/git-pkgs, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README describes dependency history indexing, package ecosystems, SQLite database storage, and CLI commands such as list, history, blame, diff, stale, vulns, and outdated.
